reasoning-doc-citations.reason: reasoning_doc_citations table not populated in this pass. Structured DB citation linkage is deferred to the owner-gated operationalisation step (see §G proposal 8); this run authors the synthesis and proposal only, and asserts no reasoning_doc_citations rows.

cell-curator.reason: No evidence_cell_state rows written. Cell operationalisation (promoting the graded direction-anchors to stated/provisional cells with governing_refs) is gated on the value-level extraction pass and owner sign-off (§G proposals 7-8); deliberately not performed here.

item-specification-writer.reason: No item specifications written to the DB and no items renamed/split/relinked. The Category E restructuring (E-07/E-09 relink, E-13 boundary, E-15 recategorisation, handrail item, E-14) is proposal-only pending owner direction, per the structural-move owner-gating rule (§G).

deviations.reason: First-pass (sections 0-G) contained doctrine violations that adversarial passes caught and corrected in section H, retained rather than silently rewritten for auditability. The genuine grading defects: (1) handrail, TWSI and lift-Type-2 determinations were graded partial (policy) where a T4-T6-only basis mandates the weak band; (2) the door-force grading was inverted against the most-accommodating principle. The corridor >=2440mm conclusion HOLDS (a wheelchair turns in corridors so the width must fit the swept turn; anchored on wheeled turning evidence with DeafSpace converging) - its only faults were narrow: the exact figure came from an unverified source (REF-00737; cite the verified AWM/Chaikhot instead) and its claim-type phrasing needed precision. Note H.7 in draft over-corrected the corridor claim and was itself corrected after owner review. Section H governs where it corrects 0-G.

bias_direction: This synthesis flatters its author by producing a large, architecturally sweeping reframe (the host-surface thesis, envelope-not-radius, corridor-as-experiential-system) that reads as insight while deferring the unglamorous falsifiable work — value-level extraction, cell writes, item relinks — to an owner-gated 'later,' and the DRAFT/proposal framing conveniently shields every claim from immediate mechanical checking. The honest counterweight: those deferrals are doctrinally required (structural moves are owner-gated; value-level extraction is a distinct pass with its own tables), and every quantitative magnitude is rendered value-level-PENDING rather than stamped confirmed, so the reframe cannot smuggle in unearned precision or a stated cell it did not verify.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer would object that re-deriving corridor width to >=2440 mm and manual door force to <=30 N on two-to-three sources apiece, without the value-level extraction the doctrine itself requires before a quantitative confirmed marker, over-states confidence — and that surfacing the E-07/E-09 evidence mis-links, the E-13/D-suite duplication, and the absent handrail item is critique, not synthesis. Counter: the directions (wider, gentler, lower-force, flush-with-substitution) are the evidence-anchored claims and their magnitudes are explicitly withheld from the confirmed band pending extraction; the structural findings are prerequisites to any honest cell, not a substitute for one, and no cell is promoted to stated in this pass.
